# Templates

Ready-to-use templates for every document type in the CypherOS documentation system. Copy and fill in the `_TODO` fields.

---

| Template      | Path                                                                                   | Use when                                                               |
| ------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| ADR           | [`adr/ADR_000_template.md`](./adr/ADR_000_template.md)                                 | Making a significant architectural or tooling decision                 |
| Incident      | [`incident/INC_YYYY_MM_DD_000_template.md`](./incident/INC_YYYY_MM_DD_000_template.md) | Something broke, revealed a wrong assumption, or cost significant time |
| Journal Entry | [`journal/YYYY_MM_DD_entry.md`](./journal/YYYY_MM_DD_entry.md)                         | Documenting a development session                                      |
| RFC           | [`rfc/RFC_000_template.md`](./rfc/RFC_000_template.md)                                 | Proposing a decision before making it                                  |
| Runbook       | [`runbook/runbook_template.md`](./runbook/runbook_template.md)                         | Writing a step-by-step operational guide                               |
| Module README | [`module/README.md`](./module/README.md)                                               | Documenting a module group                                             |
